title: Ubiquiti UniFi Smart Power Cable, USP-Cable
category: Ubiquiti / Powering / Power cables and adapters / DC cables
description: USP-Cable is a special DC power cable designed for the Ubiquiti SmartPower System . This cable connecting UniFi Switch and the UniFi SmartPower (USP-RPS) from which it will receive power if the built-in power source fails. The cable is 1.5m long and has special connectors at its ends with a simple tool-free installation GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form . Our technical support is available during this business hours
